ssl.desc: Use httpsconnection for InfluxDB server. Use "true" or"false".
ssl.name: ssl

batch_size.desc: How bigbatches of data points should be when sending to InfluxDB.
batch_size.name: batch_size

interval.name: interval
interval.desc: Time between reports to InfluxDB.  Default 30 seconds.

threads.name: threads
threads.desc: How manyworker threads should be spawned for sending data to InfluxDB.

subtree.long_desc: which CRUSHsubtree type the module should create a pool for.
subtree.desc: CRUSH level for which to create a localpool
subtree.name: subtree

failure_domain.long_desc: what failure domain we should separatedata replicas across.
failure_domain.name: failure_domain
failure_domain.desc: failuredomain for any created local pool

prefix.name: prefix
prefix.desc: name prefix for any created localpool

pg_num.desc: defaultpg_num for any created local pool
pg_num.name: pg_num

num_rep.name: num_rep
num_rep.desc: default replica count for any created localpool

min_size.name: min_size
min_size.desc: default min_size for any createdlocal pool
min_size.long_desc: value to set min_size to (unchangedfrom Ceph's default if this option is notset)

fail_fs.desc: Fail filesystemfor rapid multi-rank mds upgrade
fail_fs.name: fail_fs

threshold.name: threshold
threshold.long_desc: The factor by which the `NEW PG_NUM` must vary from thecurrent`PG_NUM` before being accepted. Cannot be less than1.0

max_completed_events.name: max_completed_events
max_completed_events.desc: number of past completed events toremember

allow_pg_recovery_event.name: allow_pg_recovery_event
allow_pg_recovery_event.desc: allow the module to show pg recoveryprogress

sleep_interval.name: sleep_interval
sleep_interval.desc: how long the module is going tosleep

exclude_perf_counters.long_desc: Gathering perf-counters from a single Prometheus exporter can degrade ceph-mgr performance, especially in large clusters. Instead,Ceph-exporter daemons are now used by default for perf-counter gathering. This should only be disabled when no ceph-exporters aredeployed.
exclude_perf_counters.name: exclude_perf_counters
exclude_perf_counters.desc: Do not include perf-counters in the metricsoutput

server_addr.name: server_addr

server_port.name: server_port

dump_on_update.desc: dump database to debug log on update

smtp_ssl.name: smtp_ssl
smtp_ssl.desc: Use SSL to connect to SMTPserver

crush_compat_metrics.name: crush_compat_metrics

sleep_interval.desc: how frequently to wake up and attemptoptimization
sleep_interval.name: sleep_interval

crush_compat_max_iterations.desc: maximum number of iterations to attempt optimization
crush_compat_max_iterations.name: crush_compat_max_iterations

upmap_max_optimizations.desc: maximum upmap optimizations to make perattempt

begin_weekday.name: begin_weekday

begin_time.long_desc: This is a time of day in the formatHHMM.
begin_time.name: begin_time
begin_time.desc: beginning time of day to automaticallybalance

end_time.long_desc: This is a time of day in the formatHHMM.
end_time.name: end_time
end_time.desc: ending time of day toautomatically balance

upmap_max_deviation.long_desc: If the number of PGs are within this count then no optimization isattempted

upmap_max_deviation.desc: deviation below which no optimization isattempted

min_score.name: min_score

end_weekday.desc: Restrictautomatic balancing to days of the week earlier thanthis
end_weekday.name: end_weekday

pool_ids.name: pool_ids

warn_recent_interval.name: warn_recent_interval

retain_interval.name: retain_interval

pool_name.name: pool_name
